text: Peggy was sleeping alone in a dormitory. She dreamed about a haunted house. She dreamed that she walked inside. Everybody was ghostly. Suddenly she heard her name. She looked up. There was nobody. Just thick fog. She ran downstairs. Somebody screamed. She peeked out. A cat. She ran again. Behind her. Claw. She scrambled. Window break. Freefall.
